The Team
Who We Are

Three 7th graders from Frisco, TX who build robots, write code, and compete at the highest levels of VEX IQ robotics.

01 — Builder
Charlie
Builder

7th grade · Cobb Middle School. Loves building VEX, rock climbing, and tennis. Second year with the Ninjas.

02 — Driver & Coder
Luke
DriverCoder

7th grade · Robinson Middle School. Handles robot programming and driving. Hobbies include VEX, tennis, and guitar.

03 — Driver
Preston
Driver

7th grade · Vandeventer Middle School. Passionate about robotics, Lego, soccer, and puzzles.

Track Record
Achievements

Seven titles across three seasons in Texas Region 5, plus a World Championship run.

World Championship
🌎 Division 3rd Place
2025–26 · Mix & Match
🏆 Skills Champion 🥇 Teamwork Champion 🧠 Think Award
2024–25 · Rapid Relay
🏆 Skills Champion 🥇 Teamwork Champion 🧠 Think Award
2023–24 · Full Volume
⭐ Excellence Award
Community
Outreach & Activity

Beyond competing, the Robotex Ninjas bring STEM and robotics to kids across Frisco. Tap to expand.

01
2025–2026 Mix & Match Scrimmage
Event Organizer  •  April 12, 2026
Event Organizer⌄

Team 276C organized a full Mix & Match scrimmage on April 12, 2026 — 6 teams competing, practicing, and celebrating the season. Plano West FTC joined as special guests to share their pathway into high school robotics. Kids got hands-on field time and finished with a team party.

1 / 13
02
Robotics for Kids at Local Church
Workshop  •  Frisco, TX
Workshop⌄

Organized and led hands-on VEX IQ workshops for young kids at a local church, introducing building and programming in a fun, accessible setting.

1 / 1
03
Volunteer at Magikids Events
Volunteering  •  Frisco, TX
Volunteering⌄

Served as event volunteers at Magikids robotics competitions, helping run matches, assist younger teams, and support the VEX IQ community in Frisco. Photos coming soon.

04
Feed the Hunger
Community Service  •  Frisco, TX
Community Service⌄

Participated in Feed the Hunger food packing events, contributing to hunger relief efforts alongside fellow volunteers in the local community. Photos coming soon.

05
Public Robotics Demo at Local Library
Public Event  •  Frisco, TX
Public Event⌄

Held a public robotics demonstration at the local library, showcasing VEX IQ robots to families and inspiring the next generation of engineers. Photos coming soon.
